bead.title: Stage 1.2: draft schema.graphql mutations + subscriptions
bead.description: Extend cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql with mutations and subscriptions. Mutations: beadCreate, beadUpdate, beadClaim, beadUnclaim, beadReopen, documentWrite. Subscriptions: workerProgress(workerID), beadLifecycle(projectID), executionEvidence(runID), coordinatorMetrics(projectRoot). Each must map to an existing event source. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 1 bead #2.
bead.acceptance: (1) Schema parses. (2) Manual: for each mutation, name the existing POST /api/* handler it replaces. For each subscription, name the real event source (worker progress SSE, bead store event bus, exec run log tail, coordinator event hook). (3) No duplicate/overlapping subscriptions.
